title: The Enchanting Glowing Beach of Vaadhoo

segments.text: This beach lights up like a starry night.
Located in the Maldives, in the Indian Ocean.
The glow comes from bioluminescent plankton at night.
Experience the magic like walking on a galaxy.
A beach where nature puts on a show.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Vaadhoo Island, Maldives — Indian Ocean. A beach that glows like stars at night. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
